title: Research Bot Workflow
description: Automated multi-agent research pipeline: plan searches, fan out parallel web searches, aggregate results, synthesize and stream final report
activity_steps: START: User provides research query (e.g. 'Impact of electric vehicles on the grid.')
Initialize: gen_trace_id(), open trace('Research trace', trace_id)
planner_agent (gpt-5.4, reasoning=medium) produces WebSearchPlan with 5-20 WebSearchItems
ACTIVITY: _perform_searches(search_plan: WebSearchPlan) — opens custom_span('Search the web')
FORK: asyncio.create_task(_search(item)) for each WebSearchItem in search_plan.searches
Runner.run(search_agent, input) — search_agent uses WebSearchTool, gpt-5.4
JOIN: asyncio.as_completed(tasks) — collect non-None results into list[str]
Update status after each completed task: '{n}/{total} finished (N succeeded, N failed)'
Print final summary: 'Searches finished: N/total succeeded'
LOOP: async for event in result.stream_events()
DECISION: time since last update > 5s AND more messages remain?
Progress messages cycle: 'Thinking…', 'Planning structure…', 'Writing outline…', 'Creating sections…', 'Cleaning up…', 'Finalizing…', 'Finishing…'

decision_points.true_branch: return None → search counted as failed
decision_points.false_branch: return str(result.final_output) → search counted as succeeded

decision_points.true_branch: update printer with next status message

agents.name: PlannerAgent
agents.role: Generates 5-20 WebSearchItems from the user query

agents.name: SearchAgent
agents.role: Executes a single web search and returns a concise 2-3 paragraph summary (<300 words)

agents.name: WriterAgent
agents.role: Synthesizes all search summaries into a structured, detailed markdown report (1000+ words)

data_models: ReportData: { short_summary: str, markdown_report: str, follow_up_questions: list[str] }
key_relationships: ResearchManager orchestrates PlannerAgent → SearchAgent(s) → WriterAgent sequentially
ResearchManager depends_on Runner (sync run + streamed run)
ResearchManager depends_on Printer for live status updates
_perform_searches fans out N parallel _search() calls (asyncio tasks)
important_notes: Pure async pipeline (asyncio). No human-in-the-loop. Failures in individual searches are silently counted/skipped — pipeline continues. WriterAgent uses streaming (run_streamed) with time-based UI progress messages every 5s. Final output printed directly to stdout after pipeline completes.
